steps.title: Extract two data points and calculate the slope
steps.content:
From the table, use the first and second rows: area of 560 ft² drains 1,008 gallons, and area of 840 ft² drains 1,512 gallons.

The rate of water drained per square foot is:
$$m = \frac{1,512 - 1,008}{840 - 560} = \frac{504}{280}$$
Simplify by dividing both numerator and denominator by 56:
$$m = \frac{504 \div 56}{280 \div 56} = \frac{9}{5} = 1.8$$

steps.title: Write the linear function and identify the choice
steps.content:
Since the relationship is linear and passes through the origin (no area means no water drained), the equation is $f(x) = mx$ where $m = 1.8$.
$$f(x) = 1.8x$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
